categories.name: IF THE TV SERIES HAD A DOWNER ENDING

questions.clue: On his last day in office, President Bartlet launches a nuclear attack on Norway; he's just never liked Norway

Congress kills the O.S.I. program; Oscar Goldman is directed to recycle title gal Jaime Sommers for spare parts
